prompt: A colorful functional MRI image showing brain activity with a heatmap overlay, matching the structure and shape of the mask.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic functional MRI (fMRI) image of a brain cross-section. This image should perfectly align with the anatomical structure and outer shape provided by image 1. A colorful heatmap overlay, using a gradient from reds for high activity to blues for low activity, must clearly display neural activity within these brain regions.
